channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Challenges and Solutions for Vaccination in Nigeria's Rural Communities
item.description: According to Patrick Chimuanya Etus, many parents for rural Nigeria dey willing make dem pikin dem get vaccine, but wahala dey mainly because of structural challenges. Long distance to health centres,...

item.title: Sarnia Legionnaires complete GOHL season without a win
item.description: The Sarnia Legionnaires, a junior B hockey team in the Greater Ontario Hockey League (GOHL), endured a historically difficult season, finishing with a record of 0 wins and 50 losses. Their final game,...

item.title: Zamfara Governor Joins APC, Party Chieftains Express Support
item.description: Na big matter don happen for Zamfara State as the state governor, Dauda Lawal, don officially join the All Progressives Congress (APC). APC chieftain Sani Abdullahi Shinkafi, wey be former governorshi...

item.title: Police Officers Seek Dismissal of Baby Pendo Murder Charges in High Court
item.description: Four senior police commanders implicated in the 2017 murder of six-month-old Baby Samantha Pendo during post-election violence in Kisumu's Nyalenda estate have filed an application at the High Court t...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Maasai Names and Their Meanings
item.description: This article provides an in-depth look at Maasai names and their cultural significance. In the Maasai community, names are carefully chosen to reflect personal attributes, birth circumstances, events,...

item.title: Survey Reveals Motivations and Trends in UK Will-Making
item.description: A recent survey by Great Ormond Street Hospital Charity (Gosh Charity) highlights that while many Britons aspire to leave a lasting legacy, a large proportion have yet to formalise their wishes throug...

item.title: Sahibzada Farhan Named in ICC T20 World Cup 2026 Team of the Tournament Despite Pakistan's Early Exit
item.description: The International Cricket Council (ICC) has announced its official Team of the Tournament for the 2026 Men’s T20 World Cup, held recently with India emerging as champions after defeating New Zealand i...

item.title: How Media Can Rebuild Trust and Integrity in Journalism
item.description: In Tanzania and beyond, the media industry is facing serious challenges that threaten trust and credibility. Audiences are becoming more sceptical, newsrooms are under pressure, and commercial models ...

item.title: DOST shifts to 4-day workweek to reduce energy consumption amid Middle East conflict
item.description: The Department of Science and Technology (DOST) has announced that it will implement a four-day workweek for its offices starting March 9, 2026, as part of the government's energy conservation measure...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif Announces Fuel Conservation and Austerity Measures Amid Middle East Conflict Fallout
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif addressed the nation on Monday and unveiled a series of tough austerity steps to save fuel and reduce expenses, as Pakistan faces serious challenges from the ongoing war ...

item.title: Dangote Refinery commits to stable fuel supply for Nigeria amid global oil price fluctuations
item.description: Dangote Refinery don confirm say dem go prioritise domestic fuel supply so Nigeria no go suffer shortage even as wahala dey for global oil market because of US-Israel and Iran tension. The refinery, w...

item.title: Explosive device thrown during protest near New York Mayor Mamdani's residence; suspects arrested
item.description: During a protest outside New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's residence in Manhattan, an improvised explosive device (IED) was thrown by a counter-protester. The device, a jar filled with nuts, bolts, and ...

item.title: Explaining 'On Division': How Bills Pass in the House of Commons Without a Vote
item.description: In the current session of Parliament, MPs are increasingly allowing bills to pass in the House of Commons without formally voting, a procedure known as 'on division.' This method permits legislation t...

item.title: Two US Citizens Arrested Over Explosive Incident at New York Protest
item.description: Two men, both US citizens, have been taken into custody after allegedly throwing a nail bomb near a protest outside the official residence of New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani. The NYPD confirmed that the...

item.title: High Court Hears Claims That Gerry Adams Was Involved in IRA Bombing Decisions
item.description: Gerry Adams, the former Sinn Féin president, is facing legal action in the High Court in London, with three men alleging that he was directly responsible for and complicit in the Provisional IRA's dec...

item.title: UPSC Rank 301 Clarified: Ghazipur's Akanksha Singh Confirmed as Successful Candidate
item.description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) on Monday clarified a confusion that arose after the Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2025 results were declared. Media reports and social media posts sugges...

item.title: Australian Government provides protection to Iranian women’s footballers in Australia
item.description: At least five members of the Iranian national women’s football team are being safeguarded by Australian government officials while in Australia for the Women’s Asian Cup, following public protests aga...

item.title: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Government Implements Fuel-Saving Measures Including Virtual Meetings and 50% Work-from-Home Policy Amid Global Oil Crisis
item.description: The Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) government has introduced a fuel conservation and responsible governance plan due to fears of fuel shortage in Pakistan. This comes after the ongoing conflict between Iran,...

item.title: Physicists Propose Quantum Paths That Deviate From Classical Relativity
item.description: Researchers at Vienna University of Technology have developed a new approach to studying quantum gravity by revisiting a fundamental concept in Einstein's general relativity: geodesics, or the paths p...

item.title: Iran conflict sends oil prices higher, putting South African inflation under pressure
item.description: The ongoing conflict involving Iran, Israel, and the United States has driven Brent crude prices above $100 a barrel, briefly approaching $120. This sharp rise in oil prices has heightened concerns fo...
